## Extracted technique pool
### Root variables
- --ana-renk: 330, 80%, 75%;
- --ana-renk: :390, 80%, 75%;
- --ayar-banner-kart-baslik-padding: 8px 15px;
- --ayar-banner-kart-baslik-padding: 8px 15px;                                       /* [Açıklama] Banner altı kayan kartların başlık alanının iç boşluğunu tanımlar. */

- --fds-accent-dark-2: 215, 100%, 29%;
- --fds-accent-dark-3: 226, 100%, 20%;

- --fds-accent-light-2: 199, 99%, 69%;
- --fds-accent-light-3: 0, 0%, 100%;

- --fds-acrylic-fallback-filter: blur(32px) saturate(200%);

- --fds-acrylic-noise-asset: url(data:image/png;base64,);

- --fds-body-large-font-size: 18px;
- --fds-caption-font-size: 15;
- --fds-control-corner-radius: 20px;
- --fds-control-corner-radius: 20px; /* Neon için daha keskin köşeler */
- --fds-control-corner-radius: var(--ayar-kose-yuvarlakligi-genel) !important;
- --fds-control-corner-radius: var(--ayar-kose-yuvarlakligi-genel) !important;       /* [Açıklama] FDS bileşenlerinin köşe yuvarlaklığını genel ayarla eşitlemeyi sağlar. */

- --fds-control-corner-radius: var(--varsayilan-kose-yuvarlakligi) !important;
- --fds-control-fast-duration: 167ms;
- --fds-control-fast-out-slow-in-easing: cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0, 1);
- --fds-control-faster-duration: 83ms;
- --fds-control-normal-duration: .25s;
- --fds-control-slow-duration: 333ms;
- --fds-display-font-size: 68px;
- --fds-focus-stroke: 0 0 0 1px var(--fds-focus-stroke-inner), 0 0 0 3px var(--fds-focus-stroke-outer);
- --fds-font-family-display: "Segoe UI Variable Display", "Seoge UI Variable Static Display", var(--fds-font-family-fallback);
- --fds-font-family-fallback: "Segoe UI", -apple-system, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, BlinkMacSystemFont, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
- --fds-font-family-small: "Segoe UI Variable Small", "Seoge UI Variable Static Small", var(--fds-font-family-fallback);
- --fds-font-family-text: "Segoe UI Variable Text", "Seoge UI Variable Static Text", var(--fds-font-family-fallback);
- --fds-overlay-corner-radius: 20px;
- --fds-overlay-corner-radius: var(--ayar-kose-yuvarlakligi-genel) !important;

- --fds-overlay-corner-radius: var(--varsayilan-kose-yuvarlakligi) !important;

- --fds-title-font-size: 28px;
- --fds-title-large-font-size: 40px;

- --tema-adi: "Sakura Esintisi";

- --url-inceleme-yok-resim:url('https://images-wixmp-ed30a86b8c4ca887773594c2.wixmp.com/f/ec4d35a6-d667-4476-bbb3-27502dbcc7da/dajh2xj-1726d1dc-cfc3-4901-9f5e-dec01bf2c180.png/v1/fill/w_994,h_804/rem_by_aryesmye_dajh2xj-pre.png?token=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..jdIMNMiSELOSZhN31O1If0Ka-0iY7op09MbkRcIZbJ8');
- --url-inceleme-yok-resim:url('https://images-wixmp-ed30a86b8c4ca887773594c2.wixmp.com/f/ec4d35a6-d667-4476-bbb3-27502dbcc7da/dajh2xj-1726d1dc-cfc3-4901-9f5e-dec01bf2c180.png/v1/fill/w_994,h_804/rem_by_aryesmye_dajh2xj-pre.png?token=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..jdIMNMiSELOSZhN31O1If0Ka-0iY7op09MbkRcIZbJ8'); /* İnceleme olmadığında gösterilecek resim. */
- --url-logo: ''; /* Bu tema emoji kullandığı için boş bırakıldı */
- --url-logo: url('https://images-wixmp-ed30a86b8c4ca887773594c2.wixmp.com/f/bea6ae23-6fbf-4681-8057-36fac1eabd1a/dk7beqx-4007f2f1-7faa-449a-aa52-fb2a4b23316c.png?token=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..XLQg1kGAKdqayLFwuanXUdSAuRfW1SUatuD3rWNEXds'); /* Masaüstü ve mobil başlıklarda kullanılacak logo görselinin adresi. */
- --url-logo: url('https://images-wixmp-ed30a86b8c4ca887773594c2.wixmp.com/f/d34adb7b-c27e-4427-90ac-787381d4f18b/dilttkx-edf4d290-20ba-44a5-aeb5-dfd53a470084.png?token=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..6_vTIDnN8wCTyznFo9Oq5Twfo4qcETkGCxvajSMrohQ'); /* Masaüstü ve mobil başlıklarda kullanılacak logo görselinin adresi. */
- --varsayilan-kose-yuvarlakligi: 20px;
- --vurgu-rengi: 330, 80%, 65%;
- --vurgu-rengi: 390, 80%, 65%;
### Theme modes
- dark
- light
- system
### Important override usage files
- MY SAKURA V2 .css
- My sakura.css
- REzero v10.2.css
- REzero v8 (youtube) - Kopya.css
- REzero v8.css
- REゼロ-V7.css
- Re：ゼロ.css
- YTanimev3.css
- crimson.css
- ryo yamada.css
- ytAnime(REzero) light and dark  copy.css
- ytAnime(REzero, neon).css
- ytAnime(REzero, neon)new.css
### Background/image techniques
- conic-gradient(from var(--gradient-angle),
            hsl(180, 100%, 70%),
            hsl(300, 100%, 75%),
            hsl(60, 100%, 70%),
            hsl(180, 100%, 70%))
- hsl(0, 0%, 100%)
- hsl(0, 0%, 16%)
- hsl(270, 10%, 12%)
- hsl(280, 8%, 18%)
- hsl(340, 100%, 96%)
- linear-gradient(105deg, transparent 30%, var(--renk-vurgu-ikincil), transparent 70%) !important
- linear-gradient(135deg, #5DE0E6 40%, #9D67F6 60%) !important
- linear-gradient(135deg, hsl(180, 100%, 60%), hsl(270, 100%, 70%)) !important
- linear-gradient(to top, var(--renk-arkaplan-banner-kart-baslik-golge) 0%, transparent 100%)
- none !important
- transparent !important
- url()
- url(https://example.com/light-theme-background.jpg)
- var(--theme-bg-image)
- var(--theme-dark-bg-image)
- var(--theme-dark-bg-image) !important
- var(--theme-light-bg-image)
- var(--theme-light-bg-image) !important
- var(--theme-system-bg-image)
- var(--url-ai-banner-resim) !important
- var(--url-inceleme-yok-resim) !important
- var(--url-logo) no-repeat center center !important
### Logo/text overlay techniques
- content url
- pseudo-element overlay

- MY SAKURA V2 .css
- My sakura.css
